## Summary
f(R), scalar-tensor, and braneworld gravity theories offer alternatives to dark energy by modifying GR on cosmological scales while screening on solar system scales.

## Evidence
Current growth rate and gravitational slip measurements are consistent with GR at the 10% level.

## Significance
Stage-IV surveys will test GR at the 1% level. If the Hubble tension resolves via modified gravity, it would be a paradigm shift.
